overview: Pixtral Large (24.11) is a large language model from Mistral AI, part of the Pixtral line. Released 2024-11-18. Multimodal vision-language line (now largely folded into newer unified models).
What's notable in this version: 124B vision model built on Mistral Large 2, 128k context, open weights (pixtral-large-2411).
